review_summary.college_name: Anugrah Narayan Magadh Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college for MBBS in Bihar. Faculty members, hospital, patient flow are all good.

content.Placements: After MBBS you can directly join either as a Junior resident (JR) (Non-academic) or as a medical officer in Bihar government posted at different medical colleges and primary healthcare centers (PHCs). Salary up to INR 70,000 p. m. or you can crack post graduation (MD/MS) entrance exam NEET PG i.e. National Eligibility cum Entrance Test or Next i.e. National Exit Test. During the post graduation you will get salary up to INR 80,000 p. m.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, a well furnished library & lecture theatres are available too. Hostel facility for first year is not available till 2023, after that hostels are available. Sports & games facilities are well enough. Hospitals with good patient flow is good for the clinical exposures.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty members and learning opportunities, but the infrastructure is not good.

content.Placements: Everyone gets placement here. You can either go to PHC in the village or to a medical office. You can also be placed as a JR in a district hospital with an average salary of Rs. 70000 per month to Rs. 80000 per month. An internship of 1 year is compulsory for everyone. You have to do it to get a degree in MBBS.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good. It has been 53 years since the college was built. There is Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned. New buildings are being built for multi-speciality hospitals. We have a great, air-conditioned library.

content.Placements: There are no placements in companies. But you can do internships in the college after completing MBBS. After MBBS, interns get a stipend of Rs.15,000 to Rs.20,000 per month. review_content.General: The main hospital has 3-4 buildings. One is old, and the rest of the buildings are new. There is also a super specialty hospital. Different hostels are also there for boys, girls, and P.G. students. Some hostels are old, and some are new. But the major drawback is that hostels are not allotted in the 1st year to boys.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty are good, but the infrastructure is not much good, and there is no security till now.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 200 students per batch. It is a fantastic government college, and the faculty are fantastic. All students get internships. If students work hard, they can get a seat for post-graduation in other colleges, which is a top course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. Everything is at a distant place. The library is 1 km away from the hostel, and there are no streetlights on the path. However, it is improving now, but these things are already good in other colleges. A library, canteen, etc., are available. But a gym is not present, which is so annoying.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, but it is in a remote location.

review_content.Placements: Placement chances are high, and opportunities are also good. After MBBS, you have to clear the PG examination if you want to study professional more thoroughly and wisely. The work opportunity is heavy here. Patients from all categories visit here for check-ups, whether they are middle-class people or low-class people. Everyone is treated equally.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is outstanding and explorable. Most of the campus is yet to be built. The library, messes and canteens are amazing. Roads have been reconstructed. During the covid surge, the plantation of oxygen plant took place, which saved lacs of life easily.

individual_reviews.title: SVNGMC, YAVATMAL: The place for the best doctors.

content.Placements: In MBBS, there is nothing like placements, but the faculty of the college are well specialized to help you become a really good doctor. The facilities are enough for a student to excel in his/her career. The library is also huge, so there will be no problem when the strength increases.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are fully air-conditioned. The practical labs are all equipped with every kind of scientific instrument. Hostels are also neat and clean, with a bare minimum rent of 4000 rupees for a year. Seniors are very friendly, and it is a ragging-free campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overview of SVNGMC, Yavatmal.

content.Placements: Placements are very easy in this field as there are already a lot of vacancies in this field. All the students got placed in our college. The highest packages were 1-2 crores p.a., and the lowest packages were 6-7 lakhs p.a. The average package is 10 lakhs p.a. All the major hospital companies, as well as government hospitals, are the major employers. There is a compulsory internship for 1 year. The top roles offered are Cardiologist, Neurologist, Radiologist, etc.

reviews.review_heading: SVNGMC, YAVATMAL: The place for the best doctors.
reviews.review_text: The lecture halls are fully air-conditioned. The practical labs are all equipped with every kind of scientific instrument. Hostels are also neat and clean, with a bare minimum rent of 4000 rupees for a year. Seniors are very friendly, and it is a ragging-free campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of SVNGMC, Yavatmal.
reviews.review_text: The main hospital has 3-4 buildings. One is old, and the rest of the buildings are new. There is also a super specialty hospital. Different hostels are also there for boys, girls, and P.G. students. Some hostels are old, and some are new. But the major drawback is that hostels are not allotted in the 1st year to boys.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are good, but the infrastructure is not much good, and there is no security till now.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Everything is at a distant place. The library is 1 km away from the hostel, and there are no streetlights on the path. However, it is improving now, but these things are already good in other colleges. A library, canteen, etc., are available. But a gym is not present, which is so annoying.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but it is in a remote location.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is outstanding and explorable. Most of the campus is yet to be built. The library, messes and canteens are amazing. Roads have been reconstructed. During the covid surge, the plantation of oxygen plant took place, which saved lacs of life easily.

I studied mbbs in this college. Best college. The Faculty members are very experienced and very good at teaching. Other students are also so good to each other and environment of college is best. In faculty some are at the experience of doctor. I loved the environment of college and the teachers. The college was full of study environment. Loved the Faculty member’s behaviour. I studied mbbs in this college. Best college. The Faculty members are very experienced and very good at teaching. Other students are also so good to each other and environment of college is best. In faculty some are at the experience of doctor. I loved the environment of college and the teachers. The college was full of study environment. Loved the Faculty member’s behaviour.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and internships, and it is not a good city but is beatable.
reviews.review_text: The new hostels are good for the government medical college. The old ones are really bad. It is not built for a long time. A lot of students study in the library which has air conditioners and is ventilated. It is a good new college building. New hostels are available. It takes time to get settled.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with big infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great. Many new hostels are provided in our college. It provides separate hostels for girls and boys. There are 2 hostels for undergraduate boys. Mess is available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Really happy and satisfied because of the infrastructure and best placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our college but is available in the library for studying online. Classrooms are clean and the infrastructure is newly constructed. Hostels are good because they too are newly constructed. The mess and canteen are there for students. Sports activities are there for interested students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, and I suggest everyone to visit the campus once.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good in condition. The classrooms are much better than any other college. The library has many books. The college has very good sports facilities. Food is tasty as homemade food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, relevant curriculum, good infrastructure, and strong practical exposure.

content.Placements: B.Sc. home science students receive ample placement opportunities on average. About 70% of the students are placed every year through the campus placement process. The salary package ranges from 2 LPA to 8 LPA with the average package of 3 LPA-4 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies include reputed hotels and organisations such as Oberoi, Grand Hyatt, and Novotel along with NGOs, hospitals, nutrition firms, and educational institutions. College ensures strong internship support, and almost all students get internships in areas such as hospitals, hotels, NGOs, and dietetics centres.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, relevant curriculum, good infrastructure, and strong practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors and audio-visual aids. We have a computer lab with printers, scanners, and internet. We have reliable water, el...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Canteen is available. Hostel facilities are good. The hostel fee structure is expensive. The food quality is better. Hostel is safe for all girls.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. They renovate infrastructure whenever it is required. Classrooms are good. The hostel facility is available for girls. The food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers the best faculty members for education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and friendly. The library is huge and calm. Classrooms are also spacious. Canteen is not available, but still, you can carry your own tiffin with yourself. Other facilities offered are very good. I like the entire area of the college.

reviews.review_heading: In college, practical knowledge should be given more. Remaining are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, ranging from labs to the library. Wi-Fi doesn't work most of the time. Quality of the hostel was good. There is no canteen available. Roadside food is available, which is good. Sports and games surely there but didn't manage the time with it clashes with the lecture.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges with an excellent curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. However, they need to work on the seating arrangements in classrooms, and they need to provide the cafeteria facility for students. The college provides all the basic facilities. Our college is well maintained and developed.

reviews.review_heading: Good exposure, average infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: They are charging for Wi-Fi, but we really don't have access to it. It can only be used for lectures by teachers. There are projectors or computers in every classroom and teachers usually teach using presentations only. There is no canteen in college, and the campus is very small. Actually, there isn't any campus; it's just one building. There are lift facilities, and the library has almost every book you need for your course. There is a back end area on every floor for students to relax and all...

reviews.review_heading: Nirmala Niketan College of Home Science is the best college for home science with various courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and peaceful. The college has a 7-storeyed building. Labs are good, especially for dietetics students as they have two cooking labs. One day before your practicals, you need to prepare a list of what ingredients you want, and they will keep it ready. The campus has a playground. The campus has Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms have good lighting facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for home Science.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is amazing. It provides us with different labs for biology, chemistry, cookery, craft and art, stitching and others. Our library has variety of books of academic and non academic importance. The classrooms are huge enough to accommodate at least 75 students in one go. There are projector and OHPs in each class present on 4 different floors. The classes for junior college and senior college students are different. There are different labs for Diploma and certificate cou...

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best with much professionalism.
reviews.review_text: The college is amazing and well-maintained. The cleanliness and the discipline are two major priorities on the campus. Everything in the college is systematically done from the library work to the office work. No campus makes the students focus on studies. All the staff (including non-teaching) are kind and always helpful in some or the other way.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for any home science student
reviews.review_text: Nirmala Niketan is one of the best colleges for any home science student. The college is recognised internationally for all of its departments. The quality of education is excellent. The infrastructure of this college is superb, from classes to the college kitchen, everything is well designed.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever for best education.
reviews.review_text: It is one of the best colleges on Western Express Highway. In this college, there are two libraries, one for the science department and the other one for the commerce department. There is also a canteen facility inside the college. Our college also has a gymkhana for playing games like carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is just okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good but it is clean. There is no canteen in the college. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available, but there's still a lot to improve.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has about 32 students in our present running year. The highest package offered in our course is INR 8 lacs per annum, and the lowest is about INR 4.6 lacs per annum. All pharmaceutical companies are recruiting our students with good packages. 98% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are well equipped with well-equipped digital classes, with which we can experience real-life applications that are crucial for our understanding. I don't love living in a college hostel; I come from home. And every year, the college conducts sports meets so that students can show off their good sports skills.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are many courses offered based on the percentage you secure in your graduation. The courses like data inspector, clinical pharmacists, and hospital pharmacists. We get an official and professional license of being a pharmacist. I think it is a great course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Campus life was beautiful and good enough. Nothing like ragging is permitted on campus. We had a good time during college hours. We didn't get opportunity for any cultural activities. We even didn't see how our fresher's party would be.

review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs and library are well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is also available but only for professors. In the hostel, the food served is good. review_summary.college_name: MNR College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure with the best faculty, and hospital facilities too.

content.Placements: I joined in 2024 in Pharma.D. My course is for 6 years. There are about 30 students in a batch. Special care is taken for every student in the class. 5 to 10 members every year from my batch will get placed in good positions based on the marks criteria, attendance and their performance in academics. Based on their eligibility list, students will have exams for selection in the placement, and they will get into a good company or hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The students are provided with good hostel rooms with a hygienic food court and a canteen with affordable prices. Hostel rooms are neat and clean, but the thing is that the water filters are maintained properly. The hostel rooms are very big and have ventilation. The food is also maintained in proper hygiene. The infrastructure here is good with nice facilities. The college has bus facilities and is affiliated with Osmania.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everything about my college is good; there is nothing much about it to be dissatisfied with.

content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are well equipped with well-equipped digital classes, with which we can experience real-life applications that are crucial for our understanding. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Campus life was beautiful and good enough. Nothing like ragging is permitted on campus. We had a good time during college hours. We didn't get opportunity for any cultural activities. We even didn't see how our fresher's party would be.

individual_reviews.title: MNR College of Pharmacy is helpful for all category students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities, but the placements are not as good as expected.

content.Placements: Students who secured above 65% marks can participate in the interviews. The highest salary offered by Divi's is Rs. 16,000 per month, and MSN offered Rs. 14,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. Companies like Aurobindo, Divi's, MSN, etc., are some of the recruiters. There were no internships provided for my batch, but my juniors got some internship opportunities from some companies.
content.Infrastructure: There were good facilities and infrastructure in the college. Classrooms are good. Labs are maintained clean, and all the equipment and glassware were available. Hostel facilities are also good, along with hygienic food. We have canteen facilities for everyone. The campus has a huge playground, along with indoor and outdoor games too. They conduct a sports day every year.

reviews_list.review_title: Must try this colleges for much more experience.

review_content.Placements: Every year 40 students take admission in our college through NEET entrance exam. Package was self-dependent Rs 40,000 - Rs 1.5 lakh in all fields. Students got internships in our own college for more work experience. After course number of things, students do like master, medical officer, and self-dependent clinic.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had all the facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, classrooms, and library which make students' life much more easier. It also helped during exam preparation and case study. Labs were not well prepared for whole students of single batch so I think make lab space bigger for more students acquired in.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Dental College and Hospital Patiala .

review_content.Placements: Class consists of only 50 students. After the final year, an internship is provided in the college hospital for 12 months. The best thing is this college has a great patient flow. The prosthodontics department is one of the best in whole Punjab. OPD no. is very high. with an average of more than 1000 patients per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good, with all new dental chairs being installed by the government. Proper facilities for vehicle parking are provided, with proper lab facilities also. Extracurricular activities such as poster-making competitions, seminars, etc. are organized regularly. There is an annual sports meet, and annual fiction is organized, followed by a freshers party as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great opportunity for students who want to pursue dentistry in government college.

review_content.Placements: We have PG degrees available for around 4-6 streams of dentistry. The internship for almost a year, is a great opportunity for the students on a practical basis. The internship is paid which is great and keeps the students motivated and something to look forward to.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a bit tough for BDS students to get a room in the hostel since there is no separate girls' hostel for BDS students. Comparatively, it's much easier for the boys to find accommodation in the hostel. The mess facility is great. We have a canteen working at all times with all kinds of food and basic stuff available.

college_info.intro:
JNTUH College of Engineering comprises several departments, including the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Metallurgical Engineering and others. Through its departments, JNTUH College of Engineering offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the JNTUH College of Engineering are very popular among the students. The institute offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of engineering and technology. The industry-institute relations established by JNTUH College of Engineering provide students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTUH College of Engineering also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable JNTUH College of Engineering recruiters include Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, among others. Check the popular programmes offered at JNTUH College of Engineering, along with their fee structure and eligibility criteria in the following table:

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The college has good placements, and most of the students with a good CGPA will be placed. Many MNC companies will visit the college since it is a university and a government institution. However, the internship facility is a little bit low as we have to seek it from outside on our own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My JNTUH University facts.

content.Placements: A maximum of 70 percent of students are placed in the academic year 2024 to 2025. The highest package is approximately 52 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Most companies that recruit us are like Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and AMD. These companies offer a sufficient package.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.
content.Faculty: Here, all the faculty members are professors, they are well-experienced in their teaching subjects, and they clarify students' doubts. For every semester, we have a semester exam. Exams are a little bit tough because we will study all the chapters from the start. I am joining the electronic and communication engineering branch. The faculty of this branch teaches very well.

description: JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Admission to various UG and PG courses at JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, is based on several exams such as TS EAMCET and MBA exams. The institute offers BTech courses based on valid TS EAMCET ranks. JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, accepts exams along with the courses as follows:

JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 1228 and 27732 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 1228, 1614 and 2719, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad MCA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 616. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 432, and the 2023 cutoff was 314 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MCA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every department, and every lab has its own Wi-Fi. Everything is good in this college. Good campus-wide coverage, well-equipped with projectors and computers, large modern libraries accessed digitally, and affordable basic facilities in the hostel! Grounds and equipment for major sports.

reviews.review_heading: Not a great college, but decent.
reviews.review_text: The campus was widely spread along 45 acres of land with many great facilities like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, auditorium, project labs, lawn, waiting room, indoor complex, etc. The hostel was also excellent in providing quality facilities like good food, clean rooms, and a hygienic environment. The medical team was doing an excellent job. They were available to the students the entire day. The...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and nice infrastructure and above average facilities.

WI-FI is available in department labs classrooms and two libraries.  Nice food in hostel mess. Canteen and medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.title: Good, but I think they should improve teaching faculty members and classrooms.

content.Placements: People think that only pursuing MBBS is a successful career option to be a doctor. But it's not correct because B.A.M.S. is the field that treats diseases from the roots and works on root causes. There are no companies specific for internships because hospital is the internship place for doctors. This course gives us many opportunities like to have an MO in government sector. To build on a clinic or hospital, to work with other hospitals, research field is also good after B.A.M.S.
content.Infrastructure: We get a well classroom with digital board and projector. Hostel and college both have their own mess and canteen. My college also has its own Ayurved Hospital for practice. Cultural programs, Sports, and yoga are also there. All the medical important dates are celebrated.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

description: Army Hospital Research and Referral NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 139 and 4242, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Army Hospital Research and Referral DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 139 and 4242 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 139, DNB in Critical Care Medicine turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Medical Oncology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

review_summary.college_name: CU Kerala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: If you're looking for the best university for M.A. economics, then I suggest this.

content.Placements: Our university offered a great placement opportunity. Many students secured positions at different reputed companies. The highest package was 30 LPA. Companies like the World Bank, Deloitte, Accenture and many big companies frequently hire students. Also, many students were offered an internship programme from some companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provided a broad infrastructure. Properly maintained classroom, labs with many modern equipments, clean washrooms and a library, all facilities available for students. Many different sports and clubs are organised for students' fun. Canteen food is so delicious.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.

content.Placements: Almost every student was admitted to a class. 13 LPA is the average salary, while 26 LPA is the highest. A minimum salary of 5 LPA is required. ICICI Bank, American Express, and JP Morgan, among other reputed recruitment firms, visited our campus and offered top jobs like Quantitative Analyst, Actuary, etc. Almost 83 percent of students are able to find employment.
content.Infrastructure: Particularly in terms of diversity, the infrastructure is far from sufficient. The doors at our college are still improperly sized and poorly maintained. The campus area is lovely, but not enough people use it. The majority of the campus is surrounded by trees, giving it the appearance of a woodland environment. The structures are outdated and require maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Student centric teachers.

content.Placements: College makes students get connected with pass out batches to discuss about the company recruitment and skills to be developed in future. Most of the companies for our branches would be core sectors, and the placement team would be built with an independent entrepreneurship cell. The overall placement success of college is 85.3% in 2025.
content.Infrastructure: Central University of Kerala offers more than 50 courses which is incredible. It has separate hostel facilities for male and female candidates with all the essential amenities. They also recommend some of PG if candidates are not comfortable with hostel accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall best university for M.Sc. in Physics course.

content.Placements: This institute offers its students the best opportunities for mobility. Approximately 85% of the students get placement in our college. The average package offered in our programme ranges from 7 to 13 LPA. Reputed companies like NTPC, IOCL, ONGC, etc., acted as contractors in this study. Top roles were Research Scientist, Data Scientist, etc. About 80% of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Amenities at our college were highly rated. Air conditioning and microphones were provided if the instructors were unable to hear. Fast Wi-Fi was consistently available, and the classrooms were cozy. The resources in the library were quite remarkable, they effectively utilize technology and offer extensive practical insights.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, best college for M.Com course.

content.Placements: For adults, my college was a great place to learn. To get employed by a respectable company, you must meet their requirements. Almost 70% of students who earned an average salary of Rs. 25 LPA were able to get home. The most costly package on the market was Rs. 35 LPA. Among the firms present to take on the project were Tata Steel, Axis Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was situated on 50 acres of land. The university was the only college in Kerala with a huge auditorium and a fully equipped laboratory for computer and public use. The dormitory for girls was located outside the school, while the hostel for boys was located inside. Additionally, there was a football and cricket field.

admission_process.title: Central University of  Kerala Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates must follow the admission process to get into Central University's courses.CUK admission processincludes multiple steps such asCUET,CUK Application Process,CUET Counselling, CUKSeat allotment, andCUK Fee Payment. Find below the step-wise admission process:
STEP 1: CUET Application Process

This central university accepts CUET scores for admission to UG, PG, and certificate programmes. Central University of Kerala admission through CUET involves CUET registration, appearing for the exam, result declaration, CUK registration for counselling, and release of merit/allotment list.
STEP 2: Register on the CUK Admission Portal

Now, candidates need to register on the CUK Samarth portal (www.cuhimachalcuet.samarth.edu.in) and fill out the online application form. After filling out the form, upload the required documents and pay the fee.
STEP 3: CUK Merit List

The application form will be scrutinised and shortlisted for further admission process. CUK category-wise merit list based on the applicant's CUET score and choices filled in during registration. Candidates are therefore required to keep checking the CUK official website.
Check outyour chances for admission to top colleges/universities based on your CUET Rank-Here!
STEP 4: Fee Payment & Document Verification

After the merit list release, shortlisted candidates may have to appear at the university to pay the fee and submit documents. Seats of the candidates who complete this within the given timeline shall be confirmed.
NOTE:The counselling procedure is explained as per the last year's admission process. Hence, is indicative.
Central University of Kerala Fees & Seats 2025

CUK feesfor all UG & PG courses include components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fee payments. Further, seats may vary as per the course type and number of specialisations available.Central University of Kerala feescan be paid either semester-wise or yearly as per the guidelines issued by the university. Candidates can check the following table for detailed fees andCUK seat intakefor all the popular courses:

faqs.answer: The seats for many of the courses might get vacant because the candidates got upgraded to other courses or might leave the seat, which causes the conduction of one more round, which is called CUET PG Spot Round/ Spot Counselling/ Spot Round.

faqs.answer: From the year 2021 onwards, CUET is conducted in computer-based mode. Till 2020, the exam was conducted in paper-pencil based (PBT) mode. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students during the Central University of Kerala placements 2023 was INR 3.26 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the placement package of Central University of Kerala?
faqs.answer: The University has released the median package details in the NIRF report 2024. During 2023 placements, the median package offered to PG (2-year) students was INR 3.26 LPA. Earlier, the median package offered in 2022 was INR 4.80 LPA. Looking at the past three years' records (2021 to 2023), a fluctuating trend was observed in the median package of PG (2-year) courses. For better understanding refer to the below table depicting the Central University of Kerala placement package trends: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) PG (2-year) INR 3.48 LPA INR 4.80 LPA INR 3.26 LPA

faqs.question: How is the Central University of Kerala for MA in Economics? What about the placement opportunities?
faqs.answer: The details for MA or Central University of Kerala MBA placement statistics have not been released officially. However, the combined placement data for PG (2-year) courses is available in the NIRF report 2024. The placement rate for PG (2-year) courses has declined year-on-year from 2021 to 2023. To know the exact percentage refer to the table below: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) PG (2-year) 51% 29% 19%

faqs.question: Is Central University of Kerala a good University?
faqs.answer: In terms of placements, the University has maintained a decent track record. The official placement report or brochure is yet to be released. As per the data gathered from the NIRF report 2024, 156 out of 818 PG (2-year) graduates were placed in 2023. Earlier, 234 out of 803 students were placed in the 2022 drive. Further, the median package offered in 2023 was INR 3.26 LPA, which was almost 32% less in comparison to 2022. Take a look at the below table for a detailed analysis of Central University of Kerala placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (PG-2 year) 652 803 818 Students placed (PG-2 year) 330 234 156 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 3.48 LPA INR 4.80 LPA INR 3.26 LPA NOTE: The above data is fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA from Central University of Kerala?
faqs.answer: Completing MBA from central university of kerala provides a wide range of career opportunities to the candidates. Central University of kerala provides one of the best course curriculum which helps students in prospective of theoretical and practical based applications and knowledge. It provides candidates a strong grip of business solutions and skills. The placements are getting worse this year, taking a look in last year there are only 300 candidates who got placed out of 800. And the median package was also not that high. It reached around INR 3-4lakhs per annum.

hostel.description: Central University of Kerala has four (2 for Girls and 2 for Boys) transit hostels. Seats will be allotted on merit basis on a first come-first serve basis. The hostels run their own mess on sharing basis and the menu is decided by the students themselves on consensus. Sports and Recreation facilities are available in the hostels.

library.description: Library facilities and services include fully air-conditioned and automated environment, Wi-Fi network in the University Library at the main campus, free Internet access to all, UGC-Infonet, online journal access in the libraries and departments, inter-library loan, video show, reprographic service, article alert, group mail, locker, drinking water facility, and Web OPAC.

reviews.review_heading: If you're looking for the best university for M.A. economics, then I suggest this.
reviews.review_text: The college provided a broad infrastructure. Properly maintained classroom, labs with many modern equipments, clean washrooms and a library, all facilities available for students. Many different sports and clubs are organised for students' fun. Canteen food is so delicious.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: Particularly in terms of diversity, the infrastructure is far from sufficient. The doors at our college are still improperly sized and poorly maintained. The campus area is lovely, but not enough people use it. The majority of the campus is surrounded by trees, giving it the appearance of a woodland environment. The structures are outdated and require maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Student centric teachers.
reviews.review_text: Central University of Kerala offers more than 50 courses which is incredible. It has separate hostel facilities for male and female candidates with all the essential amenities. They also recommend some of PG if candidates are not comfortable with hostel accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best university for M.Sc. in Physics course.
reviews.review_text: Amenities at our college were highly rated. Air conditioning and microphones were provided if the instructors were unable to hear. Fast Wi-Fi was consistently available, and the classrooms were cozy. The resources in the library were quite remarkable, they effectively utilize technology and offer extensive practical insights.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Com course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was situated on 50 acres of land. The university was the only college in Kerala with a huge auditorium and a fully equipped laboratory for computer and public use. The dormitory for girls was located outside the school, while the hostel for boys was located inside. Additionally, there was a football and cricket field.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The college has a dedicated department building and separate classrooms with good infrastructure. There is a good library with books related to various subjects. Itep students have their hostel named Kabani and a common mess for boys and girls separately. The mess is managed by a private company that provides average-quality food. The sports meet is called Urja, and other games are also organized.

reviews.review_heading: It is a campus for students' future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel and college are good. Each classroom is digitalised and science students have separate labs for physics, zoology, chemistry, and botany. Free Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and department. The library has various books on almost all subjects. A new library building with more facilities is in progress. Hostel facilities are good. Mess food is provided by the food sutra company, so we need to pay Rs. 2700 each month. Aravalli Medical Center is available with a 24x7 ambul...

reviews.review_heading: Good opportunity to get enrolled in one of the central universities for a UG course.
reviews.review_text: We do have a Wi-Fi facility with each student having a user ID and password. Labs have been maintained for the B.Sc. stream. Classrooms are provided with seating 50 students. There are canteens and cafes inside the campus and also it has a store that has stationary items and printing facilities. There is a mess for both girls and boys which is a privatized mess by Food Sutra, weekly 2 times they offer chicken at night. There is the Aravalli Health Centre of CUK with two doctors. Sports and game...

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the finest colleges.
reviews.review_text: In this university, the hostel facility is very good. Rooms are very spacious, and water, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available at this university. The hostel is well-maintained, very clean, and neat, and the food provided is of very good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the peaceful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, especially the boys' hostel, as most of them are newly constructed and have every facilities and neatness. I would recommend the hostels due to their good standard and cleanliness. However, there are sometimes Wi-Fi issues on the weekends. Other than that, you will have a standard and good hostel experience.

reviews.review_heading: Many extracurricular activities are organized on the campus.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is the best. Wi-Fi, labs, and digital classroom facilities are available at our university. Classrooms are like theaters, with a better work environment. Students can interact with teachers through transition spaces. The college has an excellent library providing academic as well as other books, and the library can be accessed at any time. Our university encourages sports, and medical services are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and standard course syllabus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is located at the heart of Trivandrum city. The campus has Wi-Fi, a library and is accessible through public transportation at all times. The classrooms are well-facilitated with projectors and amenities. Hostels are separately located for boys and girls at nearby locations which are well-guarded and facilitated. Wi-Fi is also provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Environment friendly huge campus with trees.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average but it's comparatively good as compared to other hostels in the locality. The food in the hostel is not good. They provide college hostel inside the campus and an Annex hostel which is 2km away from college. The hostel is only for girls, and they put high restrictions on movement. It's overall fine, but not highly recommended.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and nice hostel. Enjoying the university night vibes.
reviews.review_text: The university has a lot of hostel rooms available for students, especially for those from far away who might otherwise have trouble finding accommodations. The hostels are well-furnished and clean, and there is no need for students to seek accommodations in private homes.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus, nice hostel, and enjoying the university night vibes.
reviews.review_text: In hostels, 3 people are in one room. They provide tables, chairs, beds, table lamps, and board facilities to all students. Meal quality is average. Firstly, students have to apply for the hostel. Before some days of admission, the university publishes the list of students who get the hostel.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Central University of Kerala

likes.text: The internship opportunities are very good all around India in places like NCPOAR, NCESS, IITS, But people get through entrances like NET, GATE etc.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the most reputed medical colleges in Andhra Pradesh. The placement rate is high with graduates securing top roles in various hospitals, research fields and pharmaceutical companies. Internships are part of the curriculum typically done at the college affiliated hospital. Top roles include medical officer, president doctor and the specials doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides good and optimistic Wi-Fi facilities and well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a vast library. reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Settled for an All Rounder MBBS College.

review_content.Placements: There are 150 students who are selected from NEET UG exam for each batch each year. MBBS is a course after which almost everyone can get a job through different central and state conducting exams or in private hospitals as well through personal interviews. Every student has to do internship for one whole year after the completion of the course in the same college. It is a paid internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: With huge galleries for lectures and digital teaching, the college is well built with technically advanced labs, a central Library with all sorts of books and journals from Indian to foreign authors, clean and hygienic lavatories for men and women, has an impeccable teaching quality and conducts exams on regular basis. The hospital with almost 900 beds for the patients and a 24/7 emergency ward, also has a different building for super speciality departments. Basketball coaching and yoga classes after class timings are just like cherry on top of cake for the students here to keep themselves fit and fine. Apart from the hostel mess, the college also provides the students and faculty members with a central canteen.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college I have ever seen.

admission_overview.college_name: JBIT Dehradun Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: JB Institute of Technology Dehradun admission 2025is a mix of merit and entrance basis depending on the programme selected by the students. To get admission into the course of choice at the institute, students need to fulfil the admission criteria for the same. The institute offers a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations, such as Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Polytechnic, etc. These courses are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. The application process generally commences online, however, students may also apply offline. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process of theJBIT Dehradun.

JB Institute of Technology Dehradun course admissionis made on the basis of several parameters. Students seeking to get into any of the programmes offered at the institute need to ensure that they fulfil the admission criteria for the same. In order to get into the undergraduate programmes, students need to pass Class 12, whereas PG admissions require students to complete graduation. Further, fulfilling the selection criteria is also mandatory. The institute may accept students based on their academic merit/ entrance exam scores/ PI performance (whichever is applicable). Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularJBIT Dehradun courses:

The admission process for JB Institute of Technology Dehradun includes multiple steps from application to selection followed by admission confirmation. Students who are looking to get into the institute are advised to go through the admission criteria and ensure they satisfy the same before proceeding with the process. Aspirants can check the steps explained below to completeJBIT Dehradun admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested students can visit the official website of the institute and apply for the desired programme by filling out the online application. Alternatively, the institute also accepts offline applications for some of its courses. In such cases, students can visit the campus along with the required documents and pay the registration fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

The institute selects students based on various parameters. Students looking to enrol into the courses for which entrance is accepted are required to appear or national or state-level exams. Further, the institute also conducts online tests followed by PI rounds for admission to a few of its courses, such as BPharm. Admission to the merit-based courses is simply made on the basis of the student's performance in the last qualifying exams.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

hostel.description: The Institution has four on campus boys hostel with a capacity of over 500 students and one girls hostel block with a capacity of over 150 students. The hostel premises are wi-fi enabled and a computer centre is set-up within the premises with 24*7 internet availability. The hostel mess is equipped with modern appliance and serves pure vegetarian nutritious and hygienic food. The wardens reside in the hostel campus and look after students with love & affections. 24 hours security with CCTV Surveillance System & armed guards in the night.

library.description: The Library, besides having a huge collection of books on Engineering, Science, Technology and Humanities offers Library services through its various divisions. The Library has subscribed for 84 National/ International Journals & Magazine. JBIT Library is the member of DELNET (Developing Library Network) New Delhi. It aims to collect, store, and disseminate information besides offering computerized services to users, to coordinate efforts for suitable collection development and also reduce unnecessary duplication wherever possible.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Volleyball Court, Carom, Chess, Badminton, Billiard

In the lap of lush green mountains cafeteria is the place for all. A sip of ICE-TEA and students will get a different feeling of JBIT. The cafeteria is professionally managed by a special catering company, which is responsible for providing healthy and hygienic meals all the time.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Language Lab, DBMS Lab, Linux Lab, Graphics Lab, Artificial Intelligence Lab, Networking Lab, Survey Lab, Strength of Material Lab, Concrete and Highway Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Environmental Engineering Lab, Hydraulics & Hydraulic Machines Lab, Building Material Lab, Transportation Lab, Structure Analysis Lab, Geology Lab, Heat Power Engineering Lab, Refrigeration & Air-condition Lab, Vibration Lab, Composite Materials Lab, Automobile Emission Control Lab, Thermodynamics & Heat Transfer Lab, Flexible Manufacturing Systems Lab, Digital Signal Processing Lab, CAD Lab, PCB Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Microcontroller Lab, Analog Electronics Lab, Computer & Simulation Lab, Electrical Machines Lab, Hi-Tech Software Lab

reviews.review_heading: Placement and hostel review.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards and audio-visual systems. There are modern laboratories for CSE, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Electronics, and Applied Sciences. High-speed campus Wi-Fi is available in all academic blocks. The computer labs are advanced, with updated systems, programming tools, and 24/7 internet access. Separate hostels for boys and girls are available within the campus, with fully furnished single, double, and triple-sharing rooms. There is 24/7 elect...

reviews.review_heading: College is really good, too low budget.
reviews.review_text: Our college has around 60 classrooms, with about 50 of them equipped with audio, visual, and smart class capabilities. Room types, Triple/double/ sharing configuration. Rooms furnished with a bed, study table, chair, and almirah. Hostel fees are approximately 70,000 per year (including mess & laundry) as per recent data.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of college.
reviews.review_text: There are three different departments in which about 7-8 courses are taught. There is a central library in which about 4000-5000 books are available, with daily newspapers and different media. There are about 15 desktops available, which are connected to a high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and curriculum activities. Dissatisfied with the mess food.
reviews.review_text: All things are in good condition, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel is in good condition, but the mess food is not good. There are sufficient areas to play games.

reviews.review_heading: JB Institute of Technology guarantees trust and placement.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hi-tech library, labs, and a digital classroom. The campus is very good, neat, and clean. In addition to this, our college provides canteen facilities to the students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. It is value for money. Placements are decent.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, but the hygiene is not maintained. In a hostel, you see junk and pollutants on the floor outside the room. Washrooms are not in good condition. Mess food is very bad. The hostel conditions are not good. You can't survive if you are worried about cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: I will recommend joining this college because it has value for money.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the hostel are very good. The hostel rooms are spacious, and Wi-Fi is available. All types of labs are accessible, and the classrooms are well maintained. The library is available and open to all students. The buildings are large and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning experience with strong placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern and well-maintained infrastructure with smart classrooms, fully equipped labs, a large digital library, seminar halls, and full Wi-Fi coverage. The hostel is clean, secure, and comfortable, offering nutritious food, laundry facilities, and 24/7 water and electricity supply.

reviews.review_heading: Good for basics, but needs better facilities and industry alignment.
reviews.review_text: On-campus Wi-Fi is available. Labs have basic, sometimes outdated equipment. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and fans. Hostels are simple. Hostel Wi-Fi is weak. Mess food is average in quality. There is no first-aid facility on campus. Sports facilities exist.

reviews.review_heading: The college facilities are good. It provides everything. The hostel has very bad food.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good except the food, and it is very bad. In a week, only 2-3 days, the food was normal. There are some items like 20 a week every day, and it cooks different things on Tuesday in the morning, it will provide aalu and paratha, which is much better than every day.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good option if we are not dependent on the college for placements and only for college life.
reviews.review_text: Considering the fee, the hostel facilities are legit. The campus is also pretty good and well-maintained though there is not much scope for sports. Food is served 4 times a day. The quality of food is average. There are courts and grounds for each sport. The college doesn't encourage students to participate in intercollege sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus and faculty and decent placements. Needs more industry exposure and practical training.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers well-equipped computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and access to a digital and physical library with relevant study materials. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and regular maintenance. Mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen offers a variety of snacks. Basic medical facilities and a visiting doctor are available. The campus also provides good sports infrastructure including a playground and indoor game areas.

reviews.review_heading: JBIT is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Every necessary thing is available in the department. Every student sits at a single computer when they are in the lab, and many other things, which is present in the lab. There are very good facilities provided by the college. Food is average, but other facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Hell or heaven depend on you.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course include good classrooms and library. There is no such facility for the students to use Wi-Fi for personal use. Labs are well equipped but practicals are very less. The facilities in the hostel like medical, sports, and games are good. But the facility such as food is not that much good.

reviews.review_heading: I don't suggest anyone to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The condition of hostel is the worst. There are spider webs in hostel and wardens are very responsible. If we talk about the classes, they are so average. Mess food is very bad and many students get ill from the food of mess. They provide such low-quality food. There is no book in the library. Mess food is really disgusting.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy ranks #76 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy:

placements.overview:
Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy, is located in Aurangabad, Maharashtra. Established in 1989, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy provides 5 UG and PG courses in 2 specialisations, namely Pharmaceutical and Pharmacology. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Pharma and M.Pharma are some of the courses offered at Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences. The total fee at Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy ranges between INR 3,33,672 to 4,55,652. Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy has a student intake of 160 for all the courses. The average median package at Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy is INR 2,79,600. Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

Q. Y.B. Chavan College of Pharmacy offers courses in which field?

A. Y.B. Chavan College of Pharmacy offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes in the field of Pharmacy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with good staff and supportive placement.

review_content.Placements: About 70 to 80 average students were placed. The average or lowest package is about 2-3 LPA. The recruitment companies are Gibbes, Mylan, Cipla, etc. The percentage of students placed is about 40 to 60, with companies such as Mylan, Gibbes, etc. The placement allows for employees in MNCs to be selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classroom was good and is full of facilities. It has a Wi-Fi connection, and smart classrooms are available. The library is really very good, and all departments and their assistants are really very supportive and helpful. I am not a hosteler, but the hostel facility is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: This is an autonomous college so placements compared to other colleges need to be high. Placements are very low. The percentage of students who got placed is very low in the college. In the previous year, the highest package offered to a student was 3 LPA. MSD animal health and mebibyte companies came for placements
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are very good. The infrastructure is very clean and big. Classrooms in this college have a capacity of 60 students. The Wi-Fi facility is provided. Each department has separate practical labs. The food quality of the mess is average. The canteen is also there in the college. All sports and games are played in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Choose autonomous for industry-ready.

review_content.Placements: There was less placement ratio. Hardly one or two students were placed during the placement period. Small pharma recruiting companies that did not provide big packages. In B. Pharmacy in my time, only two companies came for placements. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Best facilities and infrastructure were there at this college in Sambhaji Nagar. Unlimited Wi-Fi access was provided to students. Labs were very big with all the pharam-related instruments. Library was also big with vast number of books. But for library, we need to pay an extra charge. Separate canteen was available at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is autonomous and making students placement ready.

review_content.Placements: The college is autonomous, and the placements start from the 1st sem of M. Pharmacy. There are CGPA criteria for placement. Top companies like Biotic Healthcare and Marksans Pharma Ltd. visit the college, making students placement-ready. The highest package students earn is in between 6 to 7 LPA. 50 percent of students get placed up to course completion. Regulatory Affair Manager roles are offered in these courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-developed, and there are many more facilities available for students. Unlimited Wi-Fi is available for students. The classrooms and labs are clean, and advanced technical things are available. A central library is available for each department. The hostels are near the college, and the food is available in the mess. Sporting events are organized and supported by the college. Medical facilities are available in the college. Overall, the college infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for education, environment, and campus.

review_content.Placements: Out of the batch, 20% of students placed through the college and self-reference. The package for students is not much more in the market, around 2 LPA. Through the college, B. Pharmacy placements are mostly in medical coding. Gibbs, Ajanta, and Wockhardt are the recruiting companies. About 50% of students got internships from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for the course. Hostel life will be remembered for a lifetime. The hostel experience on this campus is one of the best for everyone. The canteen and mess are good enough, not much more. The campus has a ground, and annual sports are conducted by the college, which is interesting and fun.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Pros and cons of college.

review_content.Placements: Some students are placed in very well companies. I don't know much about placements as I have not spoke to many seniors. I have not given any interview. I am in the 3rd year but I believe if you have the capability, then you may get placed in a reputed company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very well built and nicely maintained. I must say the campus is also very big. College is clean but the washrooms are bad and they do not have girls hostel facility. They have a boys common area and also girls common area available. There is a library too.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college for pharmacy.

content.Placements: This is an autonomous college so placements compared to other colleges need to be high. Placements are very low. The percentage of students who got placed is very low in the college. In the previous year, the highest package offered to a student was 3 LPA. MSD animal health and mebibyte companies came for placements
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the college are very good. The infrastructure is very clean and big. Classrooms in this college have a capacity of 60 students. The Wi-Fi facility is provided. Each department has separate practical labs. The food quality of the mess is average. The canteen is also there in the college. All sports and games are played in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Choose autonomous for industry-ready.

content.Placements: There was less placement ratio. Hardly one or two students were placed during the placement period. Small pharma recruiting companies that did not provide big packages. In B. Pharmacy in my time, only two companies came for placements. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Best facilities and infrastructure were there at this college in Sambhaji Nagar. Unlimited Wi-Fi access was provided to students. Labs were very big with all the pharam-related instruments. Library was also big with vast number of books. But for library, we need to pay an extra charge. Separate canteen was available at this college.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is autonomous and making students placement ready.

content.Placements: The college is autonomous, and the placements start from the 1st sem of M. Pharmacy. There are CGPA criteria for placement. Top companies like Biotic Healthcare and Marksans Pharma Ltd. visit the college, making students placement-ready. The highest package students earn is in between 6 to 7 LPA. 50 percent of students get placed up to course completion. Regulatory Affair Manager roles are offered in these courses.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-developed, and there are many more facilities available for students. Unlimited Wi-Fi is available for students. The classrooms and labs are clean, and advanced technical things are available. A central library is available for each department. The hostels are near the college, and the food is available in the mess. Sporting events are organized and supported by the college. Medical facilities are available in the college. Overall, the college infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college for education, environment, and campus.

content.Placements: Out of the batch, 20% of students placed through the college and self-reference. The package for students is not much more in the market, around 2 LPA. Through the college, B. Pharmacy placements are mostly in medical coding. Gibbs, Ajanta, and Wockhardt are the recruiting companies. About 50% of students got internships from the college.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for the course. Hostel life will be remembered for a lifetime. The hostel experience on this campus is one of the best for everyone. The canteen and mess are good enough, not much more. The campus has a ground, and annual sports are conducted by the college, which is interesting and fun.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well built and nicely maintained. I must say the campus is also very big. College is clean but the washrooms are bad and they do not have girls hostel facility. They have a boys common area and also girls common area available. There is a library too.

reviews.review_heading: The yb chavan college review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel are great. All the facilities available in the college and hostel are good for the students. The hostel is also good in terms of facilities like a Study table, cupboards, and filtered water but mess food can be a problem as it's not that good.

reviews.review_heading: It's helping in career and creating a positive impact for students.
reviews.review_text: The library has more than 7000 books. In the library, different research papers and pharmacopoeias are available. The regulations of the library are very strict, encouraging us to accomplish something new. It has helped me in the preparation for competitive exams.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Y. B Chavan College.
reviews.review_text: The college buildings look classic, the campus is the best, the classrooms are good, and the labs have internet and are well maintained. There is a hostel for students, with fees like INR 15,000 and facilities like a bed, chair, cupboard, mess food of good quality, a canteen that is okay, and a big sports field on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Y. B Chavan College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is great; there are various facilities, such as 24/7 Wi-Fi and a library; classrooms have projectors to teach in a visual way; and the library has a massive book collection. The hostel has good rooms and mess food; the canteen's seating arrangement needs to change.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of its great placement numbers.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure and facilities but lags in the campus life.

The library has a huge collection of books and is the best place in the college. It has a great pharmacy I could say the best in the region.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the Aurangabad division.

It provides a library with 40,000 books that do not need to buy books another side. This college had its hostel which provides full facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy.

college_info.intro:
Sai Nath University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Education, Law, Pharmacy, and others. BTech and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Sai Nath University Jharkhand offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mining Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The MBA programme offered by the Sai Nath University Ranchi is a two-year programme.
Below mentioned are Sai Nath University's popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college has the best faculty members who are friendly with students and help with all problems.

content.Placements: 80% is the placement rate, with the highest package of Rs. 50,000. The recruiting companies are FSSAI, Fertilizer companies, and Seed companies. 100% of students got internships from our course. Students have improved very much, and many are inspired to become entrepreneurs or trainers. The student is very competitive with their own friends.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available, such as Wi-Fi, lab, library, polyhouse, mushroom cultivation room, etc. There are sports and game facilities. All festivals and parties are celebrated every 2-3 months. There is a 24/7 light available, and the warden is very helpful. The mess food is average in taste.

LTD, etc. Every role in the IT field I like BCA because it teaches about new technologies and software tools that are beneficial for the future. AI technology for the betterment of the world.

admission_process.title: Sai Nath University Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sai Nath University Ranchi admission process 2026ismerit-basedfor the majority of the programmes. The university accepts bothonline&offlinemodes of the application process. Sai Nath University (SNU) has courses in streams includingEngg., Pharmacy,Nursing, Management,Education, & Law. SNU admission toBPEd & DPEdprogrammes isentrance-based. However, the university also has a provision of direct admission under several programmes, if students meet the specified eligibility criteria set by SNU. Additionally,SNU Ranchialso providesPolytechnic Diplomaprogrammes in Mining, Mechanical, Electrical & Civil Engg..

Located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, Sai Nath University provides quality education to its students. All students should follow the common admission process on a merit basis or entrance test basis which is conducted by SNU (university-level). Check out the Sai Nathi University admission highlights details below:
Particulars
Sai Nath University Ranchi AdmissionHighlights 2026

Selection to the majority of UG, PG & diploma courses is done based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Seat reservation to SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD category students is applicable as per the rule of the Central or Ranchi State Government. The eligibility criteria & selection criteria details ofsome of the popular coursesoffered by Sai Nath University - SNU are tabulated below:
