Sai Nath University's admission process includes various stages, such as selection, round,payment ofSNU fees& reporting at the university.Any feepaid at the time of admission or afterwards isnon-refundable. Find below the step-by-step procedure for Sai Nath University Ranchi admission 2025:

Step 1: SNU Ranchi Application 2025:The SNU application form can be submitted online on the official website or downloaded to submit offline. The application fee is to be paidINR 500by DD in the name of 'Sai Nath University, Ranchi'. The registration processing fee with a complete filled-up form is to be submitted on or before the deadline along with the required documents.

Step 2:Selection round:Admission will be accepted based on merit in performance in the qualifying examination for the majority of the programmes. Admission toBPEdis done on the basis ofwritten tests,sports proficiency,physical fitness, & merit in the graduation degree.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation: Selected students need to pay the required admission fee & complete all the formalities of final admission at SNU Ranchi.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SNU - Sai Nath University and Education?
faqs.answer: The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA , and the the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA . The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top companies like Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, Myntra, Accenture, Mahindra, TVs, Reliance, etc., visit our campus to hire students. SNU, Greater Noida has a Career Development Centre (CDC) that helps students get ready for the workforce or to pursue higher education. During the 2022-23 ongoing placements of SNU Noida, the highest package offered to students was Rs. 58.09 LPA while the average package was Rs. 12.46 LPA. In 2021, 88% of fellowship graduates got placement opportunities during Sai University's placement drive. The highest salary package reached INR 15 LPA with an average salary range of INR 6 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students at Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: In 2023, Sai Nath University's average package for B.Tech Electrical Engineering students was INR 6.05 LPA, while the best package achieved INR 52 LPA. However if you want a good package you should work smart throughout the course and during interviews you have to perform great to get a higher package and a great job. In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BCom from Sai Nath University?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) is an important programme in the field of commerce. This undergraduate course provides various career options such as private or government jobs in different industries, opportunities for entrepreneurship, and further education like MCom , or MBA. Graduates from Sai Nath University's BCom programme can also explore job opportunities through campus placements. On average, BCom (Hons) graduates can expect a starting salary package of INR 3.5 LPA. Some job positions that BCom graduates can pursue are listed below: Accountant Business Executive Accounts Manager Tax Consultant Financial Consultant Account Executive Business Consultant.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, the library is available, classrooms are big, and laboratories are also available. The hostel is normal. The quality of food served in mess is average. The medical facility is not available. There are sports like cricket, volleyball, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: This college is value for money. Students won't regret coming to this college.
reviews.review_text: This university has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and basic amenities. Our classroom has a high quality furnished benches and tables, projectors for better understanding, CCTV cameras, there are around 10 different laboratories, more than 2 libraries, various sports ground and courts are there and many such countless facilities are waiting for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here, and the campus is nice with an open area. Classrooms are huge and good. There are computer labs and engineering labs. The library is good, and there is a hostel with a mess facility. The only bad thing is the college is situated very far from the city area. So medical facilities are not available.

In college the study is good but the crowd is not good that much & also location is just average. Teacher knowledge is at par. Course fees is cheap as compare to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Nath University, Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, but the messy food was not good. However, let me tell you, you were really able to enjoy hostel life very well. There were big facilities to play cricket in the hostel. If you were a cricket player, you could play at the back. The hostels were big enough, but you might not have liked the food during the match.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Shadan Institute of Medical Sciences:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty is good but needs improvement with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS colleges, there's no such thing as placements. We have 4 years plus an internship year to gain practical knowledge, after which we'll get our MBBS degree and later we can practice anywhere or work as DMOs in corporate hospitals. People generally study for NEET PG after MBBS, which can land us better job opportunities anywhere.
review_content.Infrastructure: This hostel has everything that a hostel shouldn't have. There's no water, no electricity, no safety, water leaks in the rooms, insect infestations, rates, no good food, no Wi-Fi, and half-broken furniture everywhere. The only reason for staying here is that it's inside the college campus .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, average patient load in hospital and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Since this is MBBS, obviously there will be no placements. Doctors don't have a thing called placement but yes, internship is done by all the students in the same institute, but if you want to change your hospital to some government hospital during internship, then this can be done after having discussed with the administration. During internship, you won't be paid since this is a private institution. You can work in other hospital with your TR and earn some money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are spacious but the air conditioners do not work. No Wi-Fi facility for students is there, it is provided only for the staff members. Library doesn't open before 10am and closes by 3:30 - 4pm, it's not 24*7 library. The labs are above average, in working condition if needed to describe them. The canteen food tastes good some days and tastes average some days, and we have seen 3-canteen owners change during our 4.5 year course. So can't actually comment on canteen food I guess. Hostel rooms provided by the institute will not be recommended by me, better take a room in nearby PG or hostel rooms. We have an event every year called PULSATION for the medicos, organized by the interns which is the much awaited and most happening part of this institute. This event has many fun filled activities ranging from different kinds of sports like football, basketball, cricket, kabaddi, volleyball and khokho to various forms of entertainment like singing, dancing, mehndi, bridal makeup and many fun games.

review_summary.college_name: Shadan Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really nice and beautiful college; results are good. Totally satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: It was not based on percentage; it was marked. I got 511, the highest is 540, and the lowest marks are 470. There are recruitment companies, but I have no idea about the internship students. There are doctors in my college, and there is a variety of specialties; it can be dermatology, gynecology, pediatrics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi and other facilities. The library is also very good. The books are numerous, and they include the MBBS course books. The hospital is clean, and the canteen is clean. The food is very tasty, and it includes a variety of dishes. Sports and games include badminton, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: For UG MBBS, it is a good college.

content.Placements: In MBBS there is nothing sucky about placements. The highest salary can depend on the number of studies you have done. If you are a specialist in your field, you can earn a good amount. Top roles in medicine can be achieved by studying superspecialties. After studying UG MBBS, you can opt for PG as well in the same college .
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is average. The library is available but not open 24/7, unlike some colleges. A canteen is available, which is good in terms of food. In sports, there is a basketball court available and a field is also available but not up to standard.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is good but needs improvement with the infrastructure.

content.Placements: In MBBS colleges, there's no such thing as placements. We have 4 years plus an internship year to gain practical knowledge, after which we'll get our MBBS degree and later we can practice anywhere or work as DMOs in corporate hospitals. People generally study for NEET PG after MBBS, which can land us better job opportunities anywhere.
content.Infrastructure: This hostel has everything that a hostel shouldn't have. There's no water, no electricity, no safety, water leaks in the rooms, insect infestations, rates, no good food, no Wi-Fi, and half-broken furniture everywhere. The only reason for staying here is that it's inside the college campus .

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, average patient load in hospital and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Since this is MBBS, obviously there will be no placements. Doctors don't have a thing called placement but yes, internship is done by all the students in the same institute, but if you want to change your hospital to some government hospital during internship, then this can be done after having discussed with the administration. During internship, you won't be paid since this is a private institution. You can work in other hospital with your TR and earn some money.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are spacious but the air conditioners do not work. No Wi-Fi facility for students is there, it is provided only for the staff members. Library doesn't open before 10am and closes by 3:30 - 4pm, it's not 24*7 library. The labs are above average, in working condition if needed to describe them. The canteen food tastes good some days and tastes average some days, and we have seen 3-canteen owners change during our 4.5 year course. So can't actually comment on canteen food I guess. Hostel rooms provided by the institute will not be recommended by me, better take a room in nearby PG or hostel rooms. We have an event every year called PULSATION for the medicos, organized by the interns which is the much awaited and most happening part of this institute. This event has many fun filled activities ranging from different kinds of sports like football, basketball, cricket, kabaddi, volleyball and khokho to various forms of entertainment like singing, dancing, mehndi, bridal makeup and many fun games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It provides good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 150 students are placed in the MBBS course. There are hospitals hiring doctors and passing out MBBS graduates. The number of students getting placed into post graduation, and highly limited with very less students approaching post graduation.
content.Infrastructure: The institute has a broad infrastructure with spacious classrooms and council halls. This institution is constructed on a vast land with almost everything possible in it with a hospital, and even a mosque for students of minority Muslims is available. It is a minority college.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.

content.Placements: 200+ students are studying this course in my college. You will get a seat in government college only via merit, and it is based on NEET marks. Some NRI seats are also there. Every student has to do an internship after the final year. Internship students get a stipend of 20,000 rupees each month .
content.Infrastructure: Labs and lecture halls are there. There are no separate classrooms for any year. Hostel and mess are not bad. Due to the fact that it is a government college and hospital, infrastructure is still in development. But the classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards and good projectors.

faqs.question: What to do after NEET MDS result?
faqs.answer: Recently, the Government Dental College has released its Round 1 counselling to shortlist the candidates for MDS programs. Once the NEET MDS results are announced, eligible candidates may proceed to participate in the counselling rounds. To engage in theNEET MDS 2025counselling process, candidates must register on the official website of the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC). They are also required to specify their preferred colleges and courses. Typically, four rounds of counselling are conducted, including an online stray vacancy round for admission into the Master of Dental Surgery courses. The seat allocation list is published by MCC based on candidates' marks, ranks, choices filled, seat availability, and other relevant criteria. Successful candidates must report to the designated institute to confirm their admission. If seats become vacant, MCC will organize additional counselling rounds. reviews.review_heading: The college is quite renowned and well-known for its education quality and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good. It is fully air-conditioned and has a good number of dental machines. It is neat and clean. It also has lift facilities. It has good facilities for patients as well students. The departments have good machines for students to do practicals.
